title: Olidata SpA and Saal.ai forge strategic partnership to advance AI-powered security solutions in the UAE
summary:
Saal.ai, a prominent UAE leader in AI cognitive solutions, has entered into a strategic partnership with Italian digital transformation firm Olidata to develop next-generation security solutions for the UAE and the region. The agreement was signed in Abu Dhabi by Saal.ai CEO Vikraman Poduval and Olidata President Cristiano Rufini. The collaboration aims to strengthen digital […]

The post Olidata SpA and Saal.ai forge strategic partnership to advance AI-powered security solutions in the UAE appeared first on SAAL.
author: Saal Marketing
